title: Eva 20 Trailer 2 HQ
wikitext:
[]: Eva 2.0 Trailer 2 (HQ) Post by RVR » Fri May 08, 2009 10:04 am Official continuation of this thread . Trailer here http://geofront.ru/img/evmha_zsi92hp8pk_1000k.wmv

[]: Post by Seele00TextOnly » Fri May 08, 2009 10:10 am ^ Sweet! Thanks!

[]: Post by RockManBalls » Fri May 08, 2009 10:12 am RVR wrote: Trailer here http://geofront.ru/img/evmha_zsi92hp8pk_1000k.wmv

[]: Post by Ornette » Fri May 08, 2009 10:19 am mms://free-wms.b-ch.com/official/eva-movie/evmha_zsi92hp8pk_1000k.wmv Edit: beat me too it

[]: Post by Action_Bastard » Fri May 08, 2009 10:24 am RVR!!!! I thank you for the contribution!! Now..... LET THE SPECULATION BEGIN!!! \ EDIT: WTF, the trailer is shortened!? It's not the whole length.

[]: Post by Seele00TextOnly » Fri May 08, 2009 10:26 am Quick notes: Gendo's phones are no longer in his desk drawer The puppet doll has "Asuka" written on it in English Shot of Asuka's chest while sleeping up close is very similar to Ep 09 Shinji lays on his side smiling Clock Angel's red dot looks ever more like its core. It is within a wire cube reminicsent of Ramiel. There are lines coming up to the head that are parsing away from eachother like leaves of a plant. The ones going downward may be the same. Definitely Shinji falling backwards in front of Asuka Omg I want to see more clearly what is on Ritsuko's computer screen! I like the GUI. Shot of Kaji talking in field then Shinji getting up looks like they are in same field, Kaji talking to Shinji The weapon that Eva-02 stomps its foot to release is called a Thunder Spear The shot I thought was of a flock of birds is infact a huge armada of aircraft Also shot of two pairs of legs in a single bed hints to me that Shinji and Asuka (or someone else?) will indeed be sleeping together Rei is seriously shocked by something, and there is steam in front of her. Perhaps a man (Gendo?) as well.

[]: Post by Ornette » Fri May 08, 2009 10:35 am You can grab it from here: http://www.evageeks.org/ornette_tmp/rebuild_2.0_trailer_2%5Bxvid-mp3%5D.avi

[]: Post by RockManBalls » Fri May 08, 2009 10:36 am Reichu wrote: I am a bit curious about WTF this is, though: It makes me think of Zeruel's arm(s) splitting into digits at the front (doesn't look quite as expected if the case), but, at the same time, there's the combination of "dark environment" and "rows of little lights"...

[]: Post by Action_Bastard » Fri May 08, 2009 10:42 am Thanks for the whole trailer Ornette. And what we all thought was Sahaquiel turns out to be the syncing operation and a huge aircraft dropping a weapon from the sky.

[]: Post by Ingraman » Fri May 08, 2009 10:49 am Random things 1 - Eva-02 with his foot extract a weapon called THUNDER SPEAR. 2 - The new weapons we saw with Eva-02 action figure is the one dropped by the giant transport plane 3 - the other scene that we thougth was Sahaq. is in fact a display about an entry plug...maybe absorbed 4 -large aircraft formation is composed by V-22 Osprey. 5 - NT-3 seems really "strange" in the Eva-02 scene.... Thanks for the trailer, people!

[]: Post by Baz » Fri May 08, 2009 10:52 am Seele 00 Text Only wrote: Omg I want to see more clearly what is on Ritsuko's computer screen! I like the GUI.

[]: Post by Ramiel² » Fri May 08, 2009 10:54 am Every new trailer is like a spectasm in my pants. so many new things, need to watch it closely

[]: Post by Zeak » Fri May 08, 2009 11:14 am Some Gif's.

[]: Post by Ornette » Fri May 08, 2009 11:14 am http://www.evageeks.org/2009/05/evangelion-20-trailier-2/

[]: Post by klasnic » Fri May 08, 2009 11:27 am Thanks a lot for obtain the trailer (again) Ornette, I hate the Japanese and his censure ¬¬. Well, the trailer looks awesome and I saw a lot x , that´s very good

[]: Post by Baz » Fri May 08, 2009 11:29 am The two futon clips indicate that the Wall of Jericho scene will be present in some form or other. Hopefully they'll retain the original humor of the scene.

[]: Post by Action_Bastard » Fri May 08, 2009 11:30 am No, you saw a lot of , but I saw no in the trailer.

[]: Post by Ornette » Fri May 08, 2009 11:30 am RVR got to it before I did, had more trouble this time getting a Japanese proxy in order to find the embedded MMS link to the actual media this time. I wasn't even going to bother re-encoding and cropping until until I realized his video was incomplete for some reason. This shit looks good. I especially like this:

[]: Post by klasnic » Fri May 08, 2009 11:32 am Action_Bastard wrote: No, you saw a lot of , but I saw no in the trailer.

[]: Post by Zeak » Fri May 08, 2009 11:35 am Looks as if she is showing a lot of emotion a lot earlier on in the rebuild movies than in the series. Cant wait to see it. For those that would like to look at it Unit 05 ( I apologize for the aspect ratio, can't change it). http://www.zeak.com.au/rb2/image2.png http://www.zeak.com.au/rb2/image3.png http://www.zeak.com.au/rb2/image4.png http://www.zeak.com.au/rb2/image5.png http://www.zeak.com.au/rb2/image6.png http://www.zeak.com.au/rb2/image7.png http://www.zeak.com.au/rb2/image8.png http://www.zeak.com.au/rb2/image9.png http://www.zeak.com.au/rb2/image10.png http://www.zeak.com.au/rb2/image11.png http://www.zeak.com.au/rb2/image12.png http://www.zeak.com.au/rb2/image13.png http://www.zeak.com.au/rb2/image14.png http://www.zeak.com.au/rb2/image15.png
